title: Arachne
description: A mod themed around strings, cloth, and weaving
body:
Arachne is a mod themed around strings, cloth, and weaving.

Currently, Arachne implements a (basic) in-game editor which can be used to create simulated cloth meshes that can be placed in world.

![An image of the mesh editor UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/y6VZckSn/images/5d8dbf35dfbbe9b6362d4ff8a3a0915c9653ce1f.png)

![Some Colored Flags made using Arachne](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/y6VZckSn/images/437c70cfed8ccfa763691270a182082df2baf13c.png)

**This mod is currently a Work in Progress, much is still subject to change.**
